textByHash.0cfca4243beca33a5a7c515ebf5daa1f002e13c1: One eye doesn't equal two of my best men!
textByHash.275afa423aafaf840004441ef9518fa139246edd: If I ran away from you, I'd never hear the end of it!
textByHash.7bea037ac17614a7465ee75cb7085e0bdd273e6a: That wasn't fleeing! It was a tactical repositioning! Besides, you're conveniently forgetting what happened at Brimhaven!
textByHash.9ef7110296b4b9d6661eb19037e6a74820d99445: Well, we'll have to make things more entertaining next time then!
